header.participants_count: {count, plural, one {# in room} other {# in room}}

share.copied_description: Paste it in any chat to invite

spin.host_only_hint: Host spins. React with the bar above.

punishment.label: Punishment
punishment.tagline: Take turns. Loser draws a card.

chaos.label: Chaos
chaos.tagline: Total chaos — a wild twist on every single spin.

rig.title: Rig the wheel 🎭
rig.hint: Only you can see this — to everyone else it's a normal Classic room.
rig.footer: Higher = more likely to land. 0 = never.
rig.save_failed: Couldn't save the rig. Try again.
rig.revealed_count: {count, plural, one {Rigged for # spin 😈} other {Rigged for # spins 😈}}

multi_spin.title: Multi-spin
multi_spin.desc: A burst of quick spins — the last one counts.

swap.title: Segment swap
swap.desc: Two segments trade places — watch them switch!

nudge.title: Nudge
nudge.desc: It stops, thinks… then creeps one — but which way?

blind_pointer.title: Blind pointer
blind_pointer.desc: The pointer vanishes — it reappears at a random spot.

roaming_pointer.title: Roaming pointer
roaming_pointer.desc: The wheel freezes — the pointer wanders the options.

mega_spin.title: Mega spin
mega_spin.desc: An epic, never-ending whirl — buckle up!

tiny_spin.title: Tiny spin
tiny_spin.desc: Blink and you'll miss it — a lightning snap.

shuffle.title: Shuffle
shuffle.desc: Every option scrambles to a new spot — try to keep track!

earthquake.title: Earthquake
earthquake.desc: The wheel convulses, then breaks loose into the spin.

fake_out.title: Fake-out
fake_out.desc: It 'stops' on one — then sneaks on to another.

glitch.title: Broken wheel
glitch.desc: The wheel glitches and stutters… then pulls itself together.

jammed.title: Locked up!
jammed.desc: The wheel strains and shudders but won't budge — it stays right where it is.

approval.label: Approve new players
approval.hint: You confirm each person before they join

moderation.kicked: The host removed you from the room.

approval.waiting_body: The host needs to approve you before you can join. Hang tight!

errors.create_failed: Couldn't create the room. Try again.
errors.not_host: Only the host can do that.
errors.not_allowed_to_spin: Only the host can spin right now.
errors.predictions_pending: Everyone needs to lock a guess first.
errors.bets_pending: Everyone needs to pick an option first.
errors.cannot_refuse: You need at least one lucky spin to refuse.
errors.segment_taken: That option is already taken by another player.
errors.not_approver: You're not the approver for this dare.
errors.round_resolved: This round is over — start a new one.
errors.invalid_segment: That option isn't on the wheel.
errors.kicked: You were removed from this room.

punishment.my_tally: {count, plural, one {You've done # punishment} other {You've done # punishments}}

wild_spins.label: Wild spins 🌀
wild_spins.hint: Chaotic wheel antics — swaps, reversals, nudges — on top of the dares
